hero.title: Professional web solutions
hero.description: From custom business websites for small and medium-sized businesses to scalable full-stack applications — I build digital solutions with 5+ years of experience that delight your clients.

about.label: About me
about.heading: Software Engineer with
about.p1: I build modern, professional web solutions — from custom websites for small and medium-sized businesses to scalable full-stack applications with Angular and Java/Spring Boot.
about.p2: Quality is always at the core: clean code, thoughtful architecture and comprehensive testing. Whether as a freelancer for small and medium-sized businesses or as a developer within a team — I deliver results that make an impact.
about.p3: With an open, approachable communication style, I guide clients and teams from the first idea through to the finished product.

datev.description: Further development and modernization of a notification platform for receiving, displaying and managing notifications from various business applications.
datev.h1: Development of scalable and accessible frontend components with Angular, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
datev.h2: Implementation and testing of REST APIs with Java, Spring Boot and PostgreSQL (JUnit, Mockito, Postman)
datev.h3: Ensuring high software quality through TDD, code reviews and static code analysis (Jest, Cypress, SonarQube, ESLint)
datev.h4: Deployment of applications in the cloud and maintenance of CI/CD pipelines (Cloud Foundry, GitLab, GitHub)
datev.h5: Analysis of customer requirements and documentation (Azure DevOps, Confluence)
datev.h6: Agile work in Scrum team with pair and mob programming
datev.h7: Knowledge transfer within the team through internal talks

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimerText: The contents of this site have been created with the greatest possible care. However, no guarantee can be given for the correctness, completeness and timeliness of the contents.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: This website processes personal data only to the extent necessary to provide the website and enable contact.
privacy.section2Text: When you submit the contact form, the entered data is passed exclusively to your local email program (mailto). No server-side storage or transfer to third parties takes place.
privacy.section3Text: This website stores your language and theme preferences exclusively locally in the browser (localStorage). This data does not leave your device.
privacy.section4Text: This website uses Google Fonts. When loading the fonts, your IP address is transmitted to Google. For more information, please refer to Google's privacy policy.
